component.name: VoiceFlow
component.summary: Offline voice-to-text dictation for Linux, Windows & macOS

description.p: VoiceFlow is a free, open-source voice-to-text dictation utility. Hold a global hotkey, speak, and your transcribed words are pasted at the cursor. Runs fully offline using OpenAI Whisper via faster-whisper — no cloud, no telemetry, no subscription.

ul.li: Push-to-talk global hotkey with custom combos and modifier-only support
Automatic paste at cursor on release
Wayland and X11 support on Linux
CUDA GPU acceleration with automatic CPU fallback
